overview: CatFinity is an academic tutorial website for learning (∞, 1)-categories with Internet Identity authentication, per-learner progress tracking, KaTeX math rendering, and Twitter/X OAuth 2.0 PKCE integration that auto-tweets on lesson completion.
features: 5 sample lessons on (∞, 1)-category theory with KaTeX math formulas
Per-learner progress tracking with Mark as Complete and Reset Progress
Twitter/X OAuth 2.0 PKCE integration with auto-tweet on lesson completion
Settings page for global X Client ID configuration and OAuth token management
Clean academic aesthetic with serif typography
